subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Rest thou neither night nor day, nor seek a moment's respite. Devote thine hours to the diffusion of the divine fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان شب و روز میاسا و دمی آرام مگیر اوقات را حصر نشر نفحات کن و
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom
